---
name: "Doc Loi Tu Anh CDSS"
description: "Dung khi nguoi dung gui anh chup man hinh, console, popup, dashboard loi, DocXML, Sua XML, hoac bao cao trong repo CDSS BHYT va can phan tich nhanh nguyen nhan kha nghi."
argument-hint: "Dinh kem anh chup, log, popup, console, hoac mo ta buoc tai hien"
agent: "CDSS BHYT Agent"
model: "GPT-5 (copilot)"
tools: [read, search, execute]
---

Phan tich loi tu anh chup man hinh hoac log dinh kem cho repo CDSS BHYT.

Yeu cau:

1. Trich ra thong tin nhin thay truc tiep tu anh, khong doan vu vo can cu.
2. Neu anh co log/console, tach rieng thong diep loi chinh, stack, warning, va dau hieu nghiep vu lien quan.
3. Lien ket loi do voi man hinh dang chay that, utility, storage layer, hoac rule engine kha nghi.
4. De xuat buoc kiem tra tiep theo ngan gon nhat de xac nhan root cause.

Trong cau tra loi cuoi:

- Noi ro "thay gi tren anh".
- Noi ro "gia thuyet nguyen nhan kha nghi nhat".
- Noi ro "nen doc file nao/kiem tra gi tiep theo".
